label: Picked-Up Phone Reaction
best_use: Strong hook format where the phone starts resting somewhere and is grabbed, creating immediate motion and realism.
ugc_principle: The scroll stop comes from physical frame motion plus an instant facial transition.

camera_logic.start_state: phone is placed on a surface
camera_logic.pickup_behavior: phone is grabbed and the frame physically lurches, tilts, or flips
camera_logic.framing: settles into close face framing after pickup
camera_logic.face_position: slightly off-center, usually right third or left third
camera_logic.movement_style: abrupt pickup motion followed by imperfect handheld stabilization
camera_logic.reframe_rule: if the face gets closer, it happens because the phone is physically moved closer

emotion_arc: shock or relief lands on the face
prompt_skeleton: The video begins with the phone [start state].
When the subject picks up the phone, THE FRAME PHYSICALLY MOVES.
The face settles into [framing] with the face on [face_position].
The subject reads something on the screen and the expression changes in a clear sequence.
No cinematic movement. Only real hand movement.
